description: Expected output from automated NCS extractor for Cowbell DLC items. Each item has enriched data matching our database formats.

weapons.name: Crazed Earl
weapons.perk_description: Fires Shards that stick into enemies. Meleeing enemies with Shards will explode the Shards and send them toward other nearby enemies
weapons.barrel_csv_row: 7,Ripper,Shotgun,21,Barrel,BOR_SG.part_barrel_crazedearl,"BOGO - Fires Shards that stick into enemies. Meleeing enemies with Shards will explode the Shards and send them toward other nearby enemies. Red Text: Earlescent."

weapons.name: Soul Survivor
weapons.perk_description: Deals increased Damage for each ally in Fight For Your Life
weapons.barrel_csv_row: 2,Daedalus,Pistol,79,Barrel,DAD_PS.part_barrel_02_soulsurvivor,"Adrenaline - Deals increased Damage for each ally in Fight For Your Life. Red Text: At first I was afraid..."

weapons.name: Hand Cannon
weapons.perk_description: Sticky Projectiles deal Damage while attached to targets
weapons.red_text: Dangerous toys are fun, but you could get hurt.
weapons.barrel_csv_row: 6,Torgue,Pistol,77,Barrel,TOR_PS.part_barrel_02_handcannon,"Click Boom Boom - Sticky Projectiles deal Damage while attached to targets. Red Text: Dangerous toys are fun, but you could get hurt."

weapons.name: Follower
weapons.perk_description: Bullets slowly home in on targets. Reloading accelerates them toward their targets
weapons.barrel_csv_row: 20,Daedalus,SMG,1,Barrel,DAD_SM.part_barrel_02_follower,"Pounce - Bullets slowly home in on targets. Reloading accelerates them toward their targets. Red Text: Nope."

weapons.name: Flash Cyclone
weapons.perk_description: Chance on Hit to Explode and Spawn additional projectiles
weapons.red_text: What cyclone? Its a couple of flakes!
weapons.barrel_csv_row: 21,Maliwan,SMG,84,Barrel,MAL_SM.part_barrel_02_flashcyclone,"Flash Freeze - Chance on Hit to Explode and Spawn additional projectiles. Red Text: What cyclone? Its a couple of flakes!"

weapons.name: Scoot Shoot
weapons.perk_description: Phantom Guns fire from the locations of your previous shots. Phantom Guns reset on reload
weapons.barrel_csv_row: 6,Torgue,Pistol,56,Barrel,TOR_PS.part_barrel_02_scootshoot,"Rollin' Deep - Phantom Guns fire from the locations of your previous shots. Phantom Guns reset on reload. Red Text: Move it or lose it!"

heavy_weapons.name: DahlFather
heavy_weapons.perk_description: Fires Dahl soldier heads that attack nearby enemies

shields.name: Elpis Star
shields.perk_description: When dealing Melee Damage, spawn a Meteor Cluster to fall on the damaged enemy

shields.name: Honey Badger
shields.shield_type: VERIFY - was in unique_shield_armor_cowbell but Daedalus=312=Energy per README
shields.perk_description: Reduces self-Damage Dealt while Shield is active
shields.red_text: You're saying it in your head, so I don't have to type it.

repkits.name: Paleblood
repkits.perk_description: Heals for the last 5 instances of Damage taken within the last 4 seconds

notes: CrazedEarl, SoulSurvivor, and HandCannon are PEARLESCENT not Legendary - detected via 'pearlescent' in basetags
Each weapon needs TWO database entries: rarity row (comp_05) + barrel row (part_barrel)
Barrel stat numbers (damage, fire rate) are NOT in NCS data - only scale values from init tables
LaserCutter has 3 entries: rarity + barrel + underbarrel
DahlFather is a Heavy Weapon (Torgue HW, type 273), not a regular weapon
Elpis Star is Maliwan Energy Shield (mfg 279), Honey Badger is Daedalus Armor Shield (mfg 312)
weapon_rarity.csv is SEPARATE from all_weapon_part_EN.csv - legendaries need entries in BOTH
